result.split_headline: ~10 server modules → AngelSentinel (collector); ~28 server modules + all of client/ → AngelEye Control Plane
result.new_capability: tool-usage telemetry roll-up (heavy/dead/never_used) computed from existing JSONL store
key_findings: AngelEye has NO production daemon/serve for a headless collector — only dev launcher + single-process Docker; AngelSentinel needs launchd/systemd modelled on appysentinal install-service.sh
Single-writer invariant: AngelSentinel must be sole writer of ~/.claude/angeleye/registry.json; Control Plane mutations go via a guarded write endpoint

8 refactor areas flagged (A-H): hooks.ts overloaded, monolithic shared types, fused backfill+sync, hardcoded client noise filter, non-invalidating config cache, hardcoded workflow type, unbounded write-queue, lockable seed boolean
